plugin_desc: Socomec iPDU, UPS and Net Vision SNMP baseline child template for network-service devices under Socomec PEN 4555. This child template relies on the shared SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. Current MIB facts confirm iPDU identity, inlet, outlet, EMD temperature or humidity, threshold alarm, UPS input, output, bypass, battery, load and device connection tables, but do not prove stable shared CPU, memory, fan or power-health scalar semantics, so private health and UPS/PDU business counters are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: NetworkService
